# GET /api/v1/notifications/channel-configs

**List channel configurations**

قائمة إعدادات قنوات الإشعار - API-NOTIF-011

Operation ID: `list`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_CONFIG_VIEW (found on service:NotificationChannelConfigService)

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `array of NotificationChannelConfigResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Channel config ID |
| channelTypeId | string | No |  | Channel this config row governs (LOV-NOTIF-001) |
| isEnabledFl | boolean | No |  | Whether this channel is currently enabled |
| configJson | string | No |  | Provider-specific adapter configuration (free text) |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Created timestamp |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Updated timestamp |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by |

## Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
